title: ManaLife (Season 6 of zLife)
description: This is a Life-Series inspired datapack/mod All players start with a random amount of Mana. Can you survive with friends? Or will your world fall into bloodshed?
body:
Welcome to season 6 of zLife! 

This season Named "ManaLife" has a completely new life system!
this season uses 'Mana' instead of lives, time or money. players will start on 1200 Mana, and Every half heart of damage they take they lose one mana.


<details>
<summary>Life Stages</summary>

> Below 1200 is Dark Blue
> 
> Below 1000 is Cyan
> 
> Below 800 is Dark Green
> 
> Below 600 is  Green
> 
> Below 400 is Yellow
> 
> Below 200 is Red
> 
> Below 100 is Dark Red
> 
> 0 is Gold* (more on this later)

</details>



Every 60-75 minutes players will take down a random amount of Mana from 15 to 75. This season instead of the boogeyman, there is a curse. The curse is like a hot potato. The cursed player must deal 40 mana of damage to another player to pass on the curse.

When you go below 1 Mana, you will go to a final gold stage. When your name is gold, you will go back to a normal health system but with 20 hearts. if you are able to get 3 kills, you are taken back to dark red with 5-50 mana. But of you die on your gold stage, you are dead for good.
